name: Carrot-Ginger Wheat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. Add carrots, applesauce, brown sugar, ground ginger, and milk; mix until well combined.
4. Stir in sesame seeds and yogurt; form into a loaf.
5. Place on greased baking sheet and bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
